columns.name: readmit_risk
columns.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN dx.DX_NAME LIKE '%heart failure%' AND e.LOS_DAYS > 7 THEN 'High' WHEN dx.DX_NAME LIKE '%pneumonia%' THEN 'Medium' WHEN NOT e.ED_DEPARTURE_TIME IS NULL THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'Low' END
columns.direct_expression: CASE WHEN dx.DX_NAME LIKE '%heart failure%' AND e.LOS_DAYS > 7 THEN 'High' WHEN dx.DX_NAME LIKE '%pneumonia%' THEN 'Medium' WHEN NOT e.ED_DEPARTURE_TIME IS NULL THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'Low' END AS readmit_risk

columns.name: visit_type
columns.resolved_expression: CASE e.ADT_PAT_CLASS_C WHEN 1 THEN 'Inpatient' WHEN 2 THEN 'Outpatient' WHEN 3 THEN 'Emergency' ELSE 'Other' END
columns.direct_expression: CASE e.ADT_PAT_CLASS_C WHEN 1 THEN 'Inpatient' WHEN 2 THEN 'Outpatient' WHEN 3 THEN 'Emergency' ELSE 'Other' END AS visit_type
